name: Moussake (Greek)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Peel and slice eggplants into 1/4 inch thick pieces. Sprinkle with a little salt and set aside.
3. In a skillet, brown the meat and onion until no fat remains.
4. Add wine, water, parsley, tomato paste, and 1 teaspoon of salt and dash pepper. Simmer until most liquid is absorbed.
5. Stir in 1/4 cup bread crumbs, 2 beaten eggs, grated cheese, and cinnamon.
6. In a saucepan, melt butter and stir in flour and milk. Cook until thickened.
7. Add a little of the hot sauce to the beaten egg; return mixture to skillet and cook over low heat for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
8. Brown eggplant slices in a little hot oil.
9. Sprinkle remaining bread crumbs on the bottom of a greased baking dish.
10. Cover with layers of eggplant slices and meat mixture.
11. Arrange remaining eggplant over meat.
12. Pour milk-egg sauce over top with remaining shredded cheese.
13. Bake for about 45 minutes in the preheated oven.
14. Serve hot with spaghetti sauce and Greek salad.
